# matomo_tagmanager_variable (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matomo_tagmanager_variable" "environment" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.main.id
  type         = "Constant"
  name         = "Environment Name"

  parameter {
    name  = "constantValue"
    value = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String) The owning container's id (matomo_tagmanager_container.x.id).
- `name` (String) The variable's display name.
- `type` (String) The Matomo variable type, e.g. "Constant". See the matomo_tagmanager_variable_types data source for valid values.

### Optional

- `default_value` (String) Value used when the variable cannot be resolved.
- `parameter` (Block List) Type-specific configuration as name/value pairs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--parameter))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite "site_id/container_id/variable_id".

<a id="nestedblock--parameter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameter`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `value` (String)
